CausalMixGPD: Dirichlet Process Mixtures with Generalized Pareto Tail

Source: R/CausalMixGPD-package.R
CausalMixGPD.Rd

CausalMixGPD provides Bayesian Dirichlet process mixture models for unconditional, conditional, and causal workflows, with optional generalized Pareto tail modeling.

Details

Core entry points include build_nimble_bundle(), run_mcmc_bundle_manual(), build_causal_bundle(), and run_mcmc_causal().

Learn more via:

  • package index: help(package = "CausalMixGPD")

  • vignettes: browseVignettes("CausalMixGPD")

  • website articles index: https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/pkgdown/articles/index.html

  • vignette pages:

    • vignette("01-basic", package = "CausalMixGPD")

    • vignette("03-unconditional", package = "CausalMixGPD")

    • vignette("04-conditional", package = "CausalMixGPD")

    • vignette("05-causal", package = "CausalMixGPD")

  • website: https://arnabaich96.github.io/CausalMixGPD/
